definitions.usage_example: I am tired because I worked a lot.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I am tired because I worked a lot.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para introducir una razón o causa.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a reason or cause.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Así que / Por lo tanto]
definitions.usage_example: I worked a lot, so I am tired.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I worked a lot, so I am tired.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para introducir un resultado o consecuencia.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a result or consequence.

definitions.usage_example: I am saving money so I can buy a car.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I am saving money so I can buy a car.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para mostrar propósito (a menudo 'so that').]

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He is so tall.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Un intensificador que significa 'muy' o 'a este grado'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: An intensifier meaning 'very' or 'to this degree'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Por eso / Es por eso que]
definitions.usage_example: He studied hard. That's why he passed.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE that's why AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He studied hard. That's why he passed.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Por esa razón (menos formal que 'therefore').]
